memoryArtifacts.headline: Painting of Dervorguilla of Galloway by Wilhelm Sonmans, c. 1670. It is located at Bodleian Libraries, University of Oxford.
An antique line engraving of Barnard Castle by J. Greig after E. Dayes. Circa 1810. Later colored by hand.
Barnard Castle, County of Durham. An antique line engraving by S. Lacey after T. Allom. Published in 1833. Later colored by hand.
Watercolor painting of Barnard Castle by J. M. W. Turner (1775–1851), circa 1825. Yale Center for British Art.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Devorguilla of Galloway於1210年出生在蘇格蘭維托史爾時，她的父親Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway24歲，母親Margaret of Huntingdon16歲。她於1233年與John de Balliol在英國達勒姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1290年1月28日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波藍德柯克蘭。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Galloway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Galloway in southwest Scotland, named as ‘place of the foreign Gaels’, from Gaelic gall ‘foreigner’ + Gaidheal ‘Gael’. From the 8th century or before it was a province of Anglian Northumbria. In the 9th century it was settled by mixed Gaelic-Norse inhabitants from the Hebrides and Isle of Man.

variants.name: Gallaway
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Galloway  .

variants.name: Galway
meanings: Irish and Scottish: in most cases, probably a variant of Scottish   Galloway  , rather than from the city or county in Connacht (habitational names are rare in Ireland). During the Middle Ages Galways were wealthy merchants on the south coast of Ireland, but now the name there is largely confined to Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: Devorguilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Devorguilla of Galloway was born in 1210, in Wigtownshire, Scotland, her father, Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway, was 24 and her mother, Margaret of Huntingdon, was 16. She married John de Balliol in 1233, in Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 28 January 1290, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Kirkland, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Devorguilla of Galloway est née en 1210, à Wigtownshire, Écosse, son père, Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret of Huntingdon, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John de Balliol en 1233, à Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 janvier 1290, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Kirkland, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Devorguilla of Galloway 1210 in Wigtownshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway 24 und ihre Mutter Margaret of Huntingdon 16. Sie hat 1233 in Durham, England John de Balliol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Januar 1290 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kirkland, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato John de Balliol nel 1233, nel Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Devorguilla of Gallowayが1210年にスコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alan FitzRoland Lord of Gallowayは24歳，母Margaret of Huntingdonは16歳であった。1233年にイギリスダルハムでJohn de Balliolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1290年1月28日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドキルクランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Devorguilla of Galloway(이)가 1210년 스컷랜드 위그타운실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret of Huntingdon(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1233년 영국 뒤람에서 John de Balliol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1290년 1월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 커크랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Devorguilla of Galloway nasceu em 1210, em Wigtownshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret of Huntingdon, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Balliol em 1233, em Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1290, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Kirkland, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Devorguilla of Galloway родилась в 1210 г. в местности вигтоуншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret of Huntingdon, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Balliol в 1233 г. в местности дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 28 января 1290 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности киркланд, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Devorguilla of Galloway nació en 1210, en Wigtownshire, Scotland, su papá, Alan FitzRoland Lord of Galloway, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret of Huntingdon, tenía 16 años. Se casó con John de Balliol en 1233, en Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 28 de enero de 1290, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Kirkland, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
